creator: kanou@mil.allnet.ne.jp
text:
PfaEdit port is updated to the newest version.

How-To-Repeat: 
Remove ${DISTDIR}/cidmaps.tgz (MD5 changed), apply this patch, and
upgrade a port.

If you want to use AutoTrace, update to the version 0.28. Version 0.27a
or older ones have incompatible command-line options.
